executive_summary: Latest updates from 2 sources covering the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Monitoring 2 key developments. AI analysis refreshing shortly.
execSummaryRich: Escalation: HIGH. Key developments: At least six killed in Iran's Qom, as Tehran announces hits across region. Iran launches assault on US-Israeli infrastructure. Situation remains active.

key_developments.headline: At least six killed in Iran's Qom, as Tehran announces hits across region
key_developments.detail: A US-Israeli attack on a residential area in the Iranian city of Qom has killed at least six people, with the deputy governor indicating that the number of those wounded remains unknown. key_developments.headline: Iran launches assault on US-Israeli infrastructure
key_developments.detail: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said it has carried out missile and drone attacks on Israeli and US bases across the region.
key_developments.fullAnalysis: Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) said it has carried out missile and drone attacks on Israeli and US bases across the region.

terminology_explained.simple_explanation: Iran's elite Revolutionary Guard — controls missiles and drones.
Narrow waterway — 20% of world oil passes through it.

what_to_watch_next: Monitor live feeds for breaking developments.

india_impact.headline: India Monitors Gulf Conflict
india_impact.detail: India's energy security tied to Gulf stability.
india_impact.full_detail: India imports 85% of crude oil from Gulf. Strait of Hormuz disruption would immediately impact supply.

indiaSummary: India continues to monitor the US-Israel-Iran conflict closely given its significant dependence on Gulf energy imports and the large Indian diaspora. Oil price volatility directly impacts petrol prices for Indian consumers.
